div.div:
Spring Boot SPI:
spring.factories 中注册
ApplicationContextInitializer
ApplicationListener
SpringApplicationRunListener
EnvironmentPostProcessor
FailureAnalyzer

div.div:
Environment 包含:
• application.properties
• application-{profile}.yml
• 命令行 --server.port=8080
• 系统环境变量
• @PropertySource

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(254, 249, 231), rgb(27, 23, 8)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(241, 196, 15), rgb(114, 75, 0));

div.div:
BeanFactoryPostProcessor:
• ConfigurationClassPostProcessor
解析 @Configuration 类
• PropertySourcesPlaceholderConfigurer
处理 ${...} 占位符
• 自动配置: @EnableAutoConfiguration
→ AutoConfigurationImportSelector

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(254, 249, 231), rgb(27, 23, 8)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(241, 196, 15), rgb(114, 75, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 178px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1072px; margin-left: 1178px;

display: inline-block; font-size: 9px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#7d6608, #ac9948); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
finishBeanFactoryInitialization:
• 冻结配置 (freezeConfiguration)
• 实例化所有非懒加载单例 Bean
• 依赖注入 (按类型/名称)
• @Autowired, @Resource
• @PostConstruct 回调
• SmartInitializingSingleton

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(254, 249, 231), rgb(27, 23, 8)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(241, 196, 15), rgb(114, 75, 0));

box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #7d6608;
display: inline-block; font-size: 9px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#7d6608, #ac9948); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
WebServer 类型:
• Tomcat (默认)
• Jetty
• Undertow
• Netty (WebFlux)
application.properties:
server.port=8080
server.servlet.context-path=/api

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(254, 249, 231), rgb(27, 23, 8)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(241, 196, 15), rgb(114, 75, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 178px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1602px; margin-left: 1178px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #7d6608;
display: inline-block; font-size: 9px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#7d6608, #ac9948); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
销毁 Bean 顺序:
1. @PreDestroy 注解方法
2. DisposableBean.destroy()
3. @Bean(destroyMethod)
4. 依赖 Bean 先于被依赖 Bean
关闭资源:
• DataSource / 连接池
• 线程池 (ThreadPoolTaskExecutor)
• 定时任务 (TaskScheduler)
• 消息队列连接
